narrative:
Precinct Neave Township (precinct in Darke County) has 929 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.2 percentage points.
